steps.title: Spot the thematic thread
steps.content:
The opening “Although” sets up a contrast: despite Hawaiian literature's heterogeneity, it “is also characterized by” a thematic quality.

The colon then provides evidence—scholars have drawn connections between modern Hawaiian writers and traditional Kánaka Maoli stories—showing thematic links across time.

steps.title: Match the thematic connection
steps.content:
”Continuity” precisely names the unbroken thread connecting contemporary Hawaiian literature to traditional narratives—the thematic persistence across time shown by the passage's evidence of scholarly connections.

The other three choices violate this reasoning: subtlety and sophistication name qualities unrelated to thematic connection, while innovation contradicts the emphasis on linkage to tradition rather than departure from it.

D is correct.
